title: Overlay volume mounts don't work on Windows WSL
body:
### Issue Description

When using the option `:O` to mount a host directory using the overlay file system, the podman client doesn't transform the Windows path into the machine path, and the run fails:

```pwsh
> podman run -ti --rm -v "C:\Users\mario\git\podman:/podman:O" fedora bash
Error: preparing container cc3206c241eb8582fc9339e22140b9f44a9064d736a119c738fbf377b19a500b for attach: mounting overlay failed "C:\\Users\\mario\\git\\podman": stat C:\Users\mario\git\podman: no such file or directory
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. From a a PowerShell terminal run `podman run -ti --rm -v "${PWD}:/host-folder:O" fedora bash`
